# Home

Allow users to discover popular businesses, trending reviews, and access personalized recommendations.

## Search Bar
- Search input field with placeholder "Search anything..."
- Search icon button

## Featured Content
- Trending businesses cards with star ratings
- Popular categories chips (Restaurants, Products, Services, Health)
- Recent high-reputation reviews feed

## Quick Actions
- Single prominent button: "Contribute"
- Subtext: "Share your review or report a fact"

## TabBar
- Home / Search / My Activity / Profile

## States

### Default
Full rendering as described above.

### Empty
- Hero illustration: "No reviews yet — be the first"
- CTA: "Write a review"

### Loading
- Skeleton: search bar shimmer + 3 card skeletons + empty tab bar

### Error
- Empty state with error tone
- Retry button
- "Pull to refresh" hint
